description: Access U.S. National Park Service data: search parks, retrieve detailed park information, alerts, campgrounds, and visitor centers.

tools.name: findParks
tools.description: Search for parks by state code, text query, or supported activities.

stateCode.description: Comma-separated two-letter state codes to filter parks (e.g., 'CA,UT').

q.description: Search term that matches park names or descriptions.

limit.description: Maximum number of parks to return (default 10).

activities.description: Comma-separated activity names or IDs to filter parks offering those activities.

total.description: Total number of parks matching the query.

start.description: Start offset used for this response.

parkCode.description: Unique park identifier used across all NPS APIs.

fullName.description: Complete official name of the park.

states.description: Comma-separated state codes where the park is located.

description.description: Short narrative overview of the park.

items.description: Activity object with name and ID.

activities.description: List of activities available in the park.

data.description: List of parks matching the search criteria.

tools.name: getParkDetails
tools.description: Retrieve comprehensive details for a specific park.

parkCode.description: Unique park identifier used across all NPS APIs.

fullName.description: Complete official name of the park.

description.description: Detailed narrative overview of the park.

operatingHours.description: Seasonal or daily operating hours for park facilities.

entranceFees.description: List of entrance fee structures and cost details.

contacts.description: Contact information including phone numbers and email addresses.

addresses.description: Physical and mailing addresses for the park.

tools.name: getAlerts
tools.description: Fetch current alerts such as closures, hazards, or notices for parks.

parkCode.description: Comma-separated park codes to filter alerts (e.g., 'yose,grca').

limit.description: Maximum number of alerts to return (default 10).

q.description: Search term that matches alert titles or descriptions.

total.description: Total number of alerts matching the query.

parkCode.description: Unique park identifier used across all NPS APIs.

category.description: Alert category such as 'Park Closure' or 'Caution'.

lastIndexedDate.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the alert was last updated.

data.description: List of alerts matching the query.

tools.name: getCampgrounds
tools.description: Retrieve campground listings and details for parks.

parkCode.description: Comma-separated park codes to filter campgrounds (e.g., 'yose,grca').

limit.description: Maximum number of campgrounds to return (default 10).

q.description: Search term that matches campground names or descriptions.

total.description: Total number of campgrounds matching the query.

parkCode.description: Unique park identifier used across all NPS APIs.

amenities.description: Keyed list of available amenities (restrooms, showers, etc.).

reservationUrl.description: Direct URL to reserve a campsite.

data.description: List of campgrounds matching the query.

tools.name: getVisitorCenters
tools.description: Obtain visitor center information including hours and contact details.

parkCode.description: Comma-separated park codes to filter visitor centers (e.g., 'yose,grca').

limit.description: Maximum number of visitor centers to return (default 10).

q.description: Search term that matches visitor center names or descriptions.

total.description: Total number of visitor centers matching the query.

id.description: Unique identifier for the visitor center.

name.description: Official name of the visitor center.

parkCode.description: Unique park identifier used across all NPS APIs.

description.description: Overview of services and exhibits offered.

contacts.description: Phone numbers and email addresses for the visitor center.

data.description: List of visitor centers matching the query.
